programme.desc: When Reba tries to sell her engagement ring online, Brock bids in hope of getting the ring back; Van decides it is time to buy Cheyenne a ring.

programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean are furious when Brock reveals he had a vasectomy; Cheyenne and Van move out of the house in protest when Reba lays down new rules following a pregnancy scare.

programme.title: Jokers Wild off the Hook
programme.desc: Fly Fishing Montana Rivers with Clark Fork Trout on the St. Joe River.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner shows the power and efficiency of the swim jig for both largemouth and smallmouth bass.

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Jon drops into Missouri's Harry S. Truman Lake, targeting crappies stacked in flooded timber. He details how sonar and pinpoint jig placement turn a maze of branches into a crappie goldmine. Later, Jon heads north for early-summer jigging action - when light tackle, current edges, and subtle movement make all the difference.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: Professional anglers travel the country fishing for a living. In doing so, they become masters of their craft. From January through December, they are constantly figuring out how to get bass to bite. Gerald Swindle and Jason Christie are featured in this show highlighting springtime fishing. Tune in as these top touring pros offer insight into how they target bass during the spring.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Elite angler Rob Gee and BPT pro Nick Hatfield join the crew for an offshore beatdown on TN's Douglas lake.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Epic father and son day out fishing at Bienville Outdoors.

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Cabela's Texas Team Trail presented by Progressive lures hundreds of the best anglers to Toledo Bend Reservoir for the third stop of the season; watch to see which team takes home the title!

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour: Top 50 National Championship held at Sweetwater Marina in Delaccroix, Louisiana - Part 2.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is Crappie fishing with buddy Michael Groves.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland starts by catching a few bass on frogs, then locates deeper schools on points and shoals, landing 2-5 lb. fish on worms and chatterbaits.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: Listen up as Bill explains just how significant and versatile the sense of hearing is to the bass.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Florida's Space Coast is a great place to catch snook and Captain Peter Deeks knows just where to find them.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guys join Capt. Mike Douin for some yellowtail action in Big Pine Key; George and Lain learn about coral restoration at Mote Marine Laboratory and enjoy a grilled grouper at Tonio's Seafood Shack and Tiki Bar.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Join Captain Tim Milne for a nautical adventure on Haida Gwaii and BC Inside Passage!

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Tiffany Greene is a sports commentator who carries forward the legacy of her remarkable parents, whose accomplishments and guidance paved the way for her own success.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo leads a discussion on ocean circulation features which lead to offshore game fish.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Hordes of Halibut from Seward, Alaska plus catch-and-release Lingcod and a scenic-fly-out for Lake Trout.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Joined by Ed Sambey, aka Big Fish Ed, this week, The Two Conchs Crew deep drops for queenfish and tilefish.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob reaches into his library of fishing trips and takes us to school.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Jared teams up with Two Conchs Sport Fishing and tackles stubborn fish of the deep, winding up in a confrontation with true oceanic predators.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: Featuring deep sea fishing, sea fly fishing and fishing charters in and around Cape Town.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The islands off the Mozambique coast are a breeding ground for migratory fish and its underwater seascape a hunting ground for anglers of every ilk.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The United Arab Emirates seems an unlikely fishing destination, but its waters hold secrets that would have many anglers champing at the bit.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Our intrepid anglers are out to discover a new species of kingfish off the north coast of Madagascar. The trip to this magnificent island with so many unique species on offer is one fishing adventure they won't soon forget!

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Vibrant fall colors set the scene for an unforgettable fishing experience in the stunning Drakensberg Mountains. Join us as we seek out trophy trout in the Lakes of WildFly Country.
